title: Create Additions - Sable Compat
description: This a small mods which provides compatability for Create Crafts and Additions Wires to work on Sable Sub-Levels.
body:
# Create Crafts and Additions - Sable Compat

This is just a small mod that provides compatability for the Wires of Create Crafts and Additions and Sable. 

You can now connect your wires from world to sub-level and from sub-level to sub-level.
